title: Ubiquiti UNAS Pro 8
description: UniFi Network Attached Storage for 2U rack mounting with (8) 2.5/3.5" HDD bays , (2) M.2 NVMe SSD cache slots , 10 GbE RJ-45 networking and (2) 10G SFP+ ports for uplink. Powered by a quad-core ARM Cortex-A57 processor, complemented by 16 GB of RAM. It has two redundant hot-swappable power modules Device Power cable and power supply Accessories for rack mounting
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Number of HDD slots 8 M.2 slots 2 LAN speed (1) 100M/1G/2.5G/5G/10G Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (2) 10Gbps Other features Bluetooth Power Power type Mains power (230V) Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 250 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Material Steel "U" positions 2 LED indication Yes Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Weight [kg] 11,5 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 87 Depth [mm] 480
